name: Slow D1 macro trend + H4 trend-quality hysteresis
evidence_caveat: The original 2024-2026 holdout had already been exposed in prior research rounds, so this is not an untouched-holdout discovery result. It is a post-mortem redesign using all current understanding.
signal_timing: compute on H4 close; execute at next H4 open

features.d1_ret_60: close / close.shift(60) - 1 on D1 bars; aligned to H4 by close_dt backward-asof so only completed D1 bars are visible.
features.h4_trendq_84: (close / close.shift(84) - 1) / (rolling_std(log(close/close.shift(1)), 84, shifted by 1) * sqrt(84)) on H4 bars.

calibration_rules.macro_threshold: At each calendar-year start y>=2020, compute the 50th percentile of d1_ret_60 on D1 bars with close_dt in [max(2019-01-01, y-1095d), y-01-01).
calibration_rules.entry_threshold: At each calendar-year start y>=2020, compute the 60th percentile of h4_trendq_84 on H4 bars with close_dt in [2019-01-01, y-01-01).
calibration_rules.hold_threshold: At each calendar-year start y>=2020, compute the 50th percentile of h4_trendq_84 on H4 bars with close_dt in [2019-01-01, y-01-01).

rules.entry: If flat and macro_on and h4_trendq_84 > yearly_entry_threshold, enter long.
rules.hold: If long and macro_on and h4_trendq_84 > yearly_hold_threshold, stay long.
rules.exit: If long and (macro_on is false or h4_trendq_84 <= yearly_hold_threshold), exit to cash at next H4 open.

optional_not_frozen_extension.name: anti_chase_cap
optional_not_frozen_extension.rule: Block new entries when h4_ma_gap_84 exceeds its yearly 90th percentile on a trailing 1095-day calibration window.
optional_not_frozen_extension.note: This marginally improves realized metrics, but was not frozen into the final base system because the core macro+hysteresis mechanism carries the main edge and is simpler.
